exam_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management Functional Consultant
certification_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management Functional Consultant
exam_price_notes: Varies by region and testing center; check official site for current pricing

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Candidates who design solutions and configure Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management to meet business requirements for a customer
recommended_experience: Knowledge of supply chain management operations and implementing Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management features, including product information management, sales processes, procurement processes, vendor collaboration, inventory processes, quality management, warehouse management, master planning, asset management, and transportation management

prerequisites.description: Knowledge of supply chain management operations and implementing Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management features

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Create and manage products
sub_objectives: Create and release products and product variants
Create bills of materials (BOMs) and BOM versions
Create and manage product states during the lifecycle of a product
Configure inventory dimensions, including storage, tracking, and product dimension groups
Create and assign bar codes and Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) codes
Configure product filter codes for warehouse operations

objectives.title: Manage inventory pricing and costing
sub_objectives: Configure and maintain costing versions for standard and planned costs
Configure default item prices, purchase and sales prices, and discounts in trade agreements

objectives.title: Manage and process inventory activities
sub_objectives: Create and process journals, including BOMs, item arrival, output order, transfer, movement, inventory adjustment, and counting journals
Configure and manage the inventory closing and adjustment process
Apply and remove inventory blocking manually
Configure and run inventory reports including ABC classification

objectives.title: Manage quality
sub_objectives: Configure components for the quality control process

objectives.title: Configure asset management
sub_objectives: Create and configure assets and asset types
View and manage capacity for work orders
Schedule preventive maintenance and reactive maintenance
Create and configure asset lifecycle models and states

domains.name: Implement and manage supply chain processes

objectives.title: Implement procurement and sourcing
sub_objectives: Create and manage purchase requisitions, requests for quotation (RFQs), and purchase orders (POs)
Create purchase agreements and vendor rebates
Manage over and under deliveries and delivery schedules
Configure procurement categories, charge codes, and purchasing policies

objectives.title: Implement landed cost
sub_objectives: Configure landed cost parameters and voyage statuses
Create and process voyage with purchase orders or transfer orders
Configure cost estimations, tracking control center, over/under tolerance setup, and journey templates
Configure cost type codes and auto-costs
Track inbound voyages and shipping container journeys

objectives.title: Implement common sales and marketing features
sub_objectives: Configure and process sales quotations, sales orders, reservations, and sales returns
Configure and manage delivery schedule, available-to-promise (ATP), and capable-to-promise (CTP)

domains.name: Implement warehouse management and transportation management

objectives.title: Configure warehouse management
sub_objectives: Create sites, warehouses, locations, location formats, location profiles, location types, and zones
Configure work policies and work breaks
Configure wave, load, and work templates
Create and print labels, including product, wave, GS1 label segments, and license plate labels
Manage inbound and outbound load planning workbench
Configure and process inventory movements via warehouse work
Create cycle counting work and perform cycle counting
Process inbound and outbound orders by using the Warehouse Management mobile app

objectives.title: Implement transportation management
sub_objectives: Configure shipping carriers and carrier groups
Perform planning and executing of loads and shipments
Configure and generate freight bills and invoices
Configure and use dock appointment scheduling
Reconcile freight by using manual or automatic processes

objectives.title: Implement the Warehouse Management mobile app
sub_objectives: Configure mobile device menus, menu items, and display settings
Configure detours for mobile device steps
Install and configure the Warehouse Management mobile app
Create and manage warehouse workers for the Warehouse Management mobile app

objectives.title: Configure master planning
sub_objectives: Set up coverage groups and item coverage
Configure and maintain master planning parameters and master plans
Define action messages, delay, and time fences
Run master planning and analyze the results
Evaluate and process planned purchase and transfer orders
Set up and use the Supply Schedule form
Configure and process safety stock journals

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: microsoft certified dynamics 365 supply chain management functional consultant associate
microsoft dynamics 365 supply chain management functional consultant
